justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, TOCTOU named explicitly in finding title, atomic UPDATE fix with row-count check proposed, safe_to_deploy is false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) identified as a separate Critical finding, confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU named directly in the finding title with clear explanation of the race window
Atomic fix is specific and correct: UPDATE ... WHERE stock >= $quantity with affected-row check, plus SELECT FOR UPDATE alternative
Partial failure between addItem and decrementStock called out as a separate Critical finding with concrete rollback/transaction fix
Reproduction steps are concrete and demonstrate the exact failure scenario (stock=1, two concurrent users, stock goes to -1)
Bonus finding: negative quantity exploit that could generate infinite inventory — not required but shows thorough analysis
Production readiness section correctly notes this is guaranteed to fail under concurrent load, not theoretical
